name: jsonutils-governance-mcp
description: Expose JSONUtils' fixed read-only AI governance MCP tools in Codex.

interface.longDescription: Registers the JSONUtils repository's fixed read-only governance MCP server for scorecards, eval coverage, assets, decisions, handoff, worktree state, and validation planning.
defaultPrompt: Show the current JSONUtils AI governance maturity and next focus.
Summarize JSONUtils behavior-eval coverage and provenance.
Build a read-only validation plan for the current JSONUtils worktree.
